# MuleSoft Amazon DynamoDB Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.6) of Amazon DynamoDB Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon DynamoDB Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-dynamodb-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon DynamoDB Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon DynamoDB Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-dynamodb-connector/latest/amazon-dynamodb-connector-examples.md)
- [Amazon DynamoDB Connector 1.6 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-dynamodb-connector/latest/amazon-dynamodb-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Amazon DynamoDB Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-dynamodb-connector/latest/amazon-dynamodb-connector-studio.md)
- [Amazon DynamoDB XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-dynamodb-connector/latest/amazon-dynamodb-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon DynamoDB Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-dynamodb-connector/latest/index.md)
